title: Define Wave 39 manager dashboard pending actions contract
description: Extend the architecture docs so the manager dashboard can expose a manager-safe list of pending handoff and contract actions with additive item types, state handling, and navigation ownership.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard contract documents additive pending action item types, item payload shape, and navigation targets
UI state map covers loading, empty, mixed-action, and guardrail states for pending dashboard actions
Module ownership clarifies backend aggregation versus mobile presentation and route handling
